# tina4-ruby — LLM Context

Tina4 Ruby v3.10.50. 54 built-in features, zero external dependencies. Web framework for Ruby 3.0+.
Routes, ORM, templates, auth, queue, websocket, graphql — all built in.

Install: gem install tina4-ruby
Version: 3.10.50
Default port: 7147

---

## Router

Route files go in src/routes/ and are auto-discovered.

```ruby
require "tina4"

Tina4::Router.get "/api/users" do |request, response|
  response.json({ users: [] })
end

Tina4::Router.post "/api/users" do |request, response|
  body = request.body
  response.json({ created: body["name"] }, 201)
end

Tina4::Router.get "/api/users/{id}" do |request, response|
  id = request.params["id"]
  response.json({ id: id })
end

# Auth: POST/PUT/DELETE require auth by default
# Chain .no_auth to make public
Tina4::Router.post("/api/public") { |req, res|
  res.json({ open: true })
}.no_auth

# Chain .secure to protect a GET route
Tina4::Router.get("/api/private") { |req, res|
  res.json({ secret: true })
}.secure

# Template rendering
Tina4::Router.get "/dashboard" do |request, response|
  response.template("dashboard.twig", { title: "Dashboard" })
end
```

---

## Database

```ruby
require "tina4"

db = Tina4::Database.new("sqlite:///app.db") # or postgres://, mysql://, mssql://, firebird://

result = db.fetch("SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = ?", [true], limit: 10, offset: 0)
row = db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?", [1])
db.execute("INSERT INTO users (name) VALUES (?)", ["Alice"])
db.insert("users", { name: "Alice" })
db.update("users", { id: 1, name: "Bob" })
db.delete("users", { id: 1 })
next_id = db.get_next_id("users") # race-safe atomic ID generation
```

---

## ORM

```ruby
require "tina4"

class User < Tina4::ORM
  integer_field :id, primary_key: true, auto_increment: true
  string_field :name
  string_field :email

  table_name "users"
end

Tina4.orm_bind(db)

# Instance methods
user = User.new(name: "Alice")
user.save
user.load("id = ?", [1])
user.delete
user.to_h
user.to_json

# Class methods
users = User.where("active = ?", [true], order_by: "name", limit: 10, offset: 0)
user = User.find(1)
count = User.count
```

---

## Frond (Templates)

```ruby
html = Tina4::Frond.render("page.twig", { title: "Home", items: items })
```

Templates use Twig syntax. Located in src/templates/.

---

## Auth

```ruby
token = Tina4::Auth.get_token({ user_id: 1, role: "admin" })
payload = Tina4::Auth.valid_token(token) # returns hash or nil
hashed = Tina4::Auth.hash_password("secret")
valid = Tina4::Auth.check_password("secret", hashed)
```

---

## Queue

```ruby
queue = Tina4::Queue.new(topic: "emails", max_retries: 3)
queue.push({ to: "alice@example.com", subject: "Hello" })

queue.consume("emails") do |job|
  process(job.payload)
  job.complete # or job.fail("reason")
end

queue.produce("other_topic", { data: "value" })
dead = queue.dead_letters
```

Backends: file (default), RabbitMQ, Kafka — configured via TINA4_QUEUE_BACKEND env var.

---

## API Client

```ruby
api = Tina4::Api.new(base_url: "https://api.example.com")
result = api.get("/users") # returns { http_code: 200, body: {...} }
api.post("/users", { name: "Alice" })
api.set_bearer_token("token123")
```

---

## Events

```ruby
Tina4::Events.on("user.created") do |user|
  puts "Welcome #{user['name']}"
end

Tina4::Events.emit("user.created", { name: "Alice" })
Tina4::Events.once("app.ready") { puts "Started!" }
```

---

## Migration

```ruby
Tina4::Migration.migrate(db)
Tina4::Migration.create("add users table")
```

SQL files in migrations/ directory.

---

## Project Structure

```
src/
  routes/       # Auto-discovered route files
  orm/          # ORM model definitions
  templates/    # Frond/Twig templates
  public/       # Static files served at /
  app/          # Shared helpers and services
migrations/     # SQL migration files
tests/          # Test files
app.rb          # Entry point
Gemfile         # Dependencies
.env            # Environment variables
```

---

## Entry Point (app.rb)

```ruby
require "tina4"
Tina4.initialize!(__dir__)
app = Tina4::RackApp.new
Tina4::WebServer.new(app, port: 7147).start
```

---

## Known Gotchas

1. Route params use `{id}` not `:id` — matches Python/PHP convention
2. POST/PUT/DELETE require auth by default. Chain `.no_auth` to make public
3. GET is public by default. Chain `.secure` to protect
4. ORM uses `to_h` for hash conversion (Ruby convention)
5. Queue job payload accessed via `job.payload` not `job.data`
6. Database `fetch()` uses `offset:` not `skip:`
7. Namespace is `Tina4::` — e.g., `Tina4::Router`, `Tina4::ORM`, `Tina4::Auth`
8. Templates are Twig syntax (not ERB)
9. Default port: 7147
10. Methods use snake_case (Ruby convention): `get_token`, `hash_password`, `dead_letters`
